name: Personal Holding Company Liquidation Dividend Election

eligibility.description: Personal Holding Companies undergoing complete liquidation within 24 months of adopting a plan, where the corporation notifies distributees of the dividend designation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a Personal Holding Company (PHC) to treat liquidating distributions to non-corporate shareholders as dividends to the extent of undistributed PHC income, effectively eliminating the PHC penalty tax.
